  3. Sony
DSC-N1

DSC-N1

(17)
ID 358639
$485.57

The Cyber-shot N1 offers 8.1 effective Megapixels with high sensitivity for reduced blur, a massive 3.0"" Clear Photo LCD Plus screen with touch-screen operation and a ZEISS 3x Optical Zoom.

In stock
Sign in to add to wish list
The Cyber-shot N1 offers 8.1 effective Megapixels with high sensitivity for reduced blur, a massive 3.0"" Clear Photo LCD Plus screen with touch-screen operation and a ZEISS 3x Optical Zoom. It also comes with built-in Pocket Album and Slideshow with Music features.

Features:
- Carl Zeiss® Vario-Tessar® Lens
- Clear Photo LCD Plus (3.0"" Hybrid, 230k dots)
- 3x Optical Zoom, up to 15x Smart Zoom, 6x Precision Digital Zoom
- Touch Screen Easy Operation
- No Blur by High Sensitivity ISO800
- Pocket Album
- Slide Show with Music
- Free Spot AF by Touch Screen
- Clear RAW NR (Noise Reduction)
- Quick Operation (Start-up 1.5 sec, Shutter Time Lag 0.28 sec, Shutter Release Lag 0.01 sec)
- Stamina Battery Life (approx 300 shots by CIPA standard)
- Compact High Quality Aluminium Body
- Real Imaging Processor
- Paint on Image
- 16:9 Mode for Wide Screen TV
- Internal Memory 26MB
- 100% LCD Field of view
- MPEG VX Fine with Audio
- Histogram Indication
- AF Illuminator
- USB 2.0 High Speed Transfer
- Scene Selection Mode
- Cyber-shot Station Compatible (optional)
- PictBridge Compatible
- 15 Menu Languages (English, French, German, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, Dutch, Russian, Swedish, Norwegian, Danish, Finnish, Polish, Hungarian, Czech)

Specs

Technical details

Resolution
  • 8.0 Mega, 5.0 Mega, 3.1 Mega, 1.2 Mega pixels
Source data-sheet
  • ICEcat.biz
Type
  • Digital camera
Photo mode
  • 3-2

Memory

Compatible memory cards
  • ms pro

Display

Camera display resolution
  • 230400 pixels
Display
  • LCD
Display diagonal
  • 3 "

System requirements

Mac compatibility
  • true

Connectivity

PictBridge
  • true
Interface
  • USB
I/O ports
  • USB 2.0
Connection to PC
  • USB

Lens system

Digital zoom
  • 6 x
Aperture range
  • Auto
35 mm camera lens equivalent
  • 38 - 114 mm
Focal length
  • 7.9 - 23.7 mm
Combined zoom
  • 15x x
Digital SLR
  • false
Optical zoom
  • 3 x
Lens system
  • Carl Zeiss, Vario-Tessar

Weight & dimensions

Dimensions W x D x H
  • 96.7x22.7x61.1 mm
Weight
  • 151 g
Height
  • 61.1 mm
Depth
  • 22.7 mm
Width
  • 96.7 mm

Light exposure

Camera shutter speed
  • 1/8 - 1/2000, s
Light exposure correction
  • ±2.0 EV, 1/3 EV
ISO sensitivity
  • Yes (Auto, 64, 100, 200, 400, 800)

Picture quality

Megapixel
  • 8.1 MP
Data compression
  • JPEG, MPEG1
Supported camera resolutions
  • 3264 × 2448 2592 × 1944 2048 × 1536 1280 × 960 640 × 480
Maximum resolution
  • 3264 × 2448 pixels

Energy management

Battery technology
  • Lithium-Ion
Battery type
  • NP-BG1
Power requirements
  • Lithium Ion NP-BG1

Colour

Colour of product
  • Silver

Video

Motion JPEG frame rate
  • 30, 16.6, 8.3 fps
Video capability
  • true
Video capture resolution
  • 640x480, 160x112 pixels

Image sensor

Camera CCD sensor
  • Super HAD CCD
Optical sensor size
  • 1/1.8 "
Sensor type
  • CCD

Focusing

Focus
  • Single, Monitoring, Multi Point, Centre weighted, Flexible Spot

Flash

Flash
  • Auto, Forced Flash, Slow Synchro, No Flash
Flash modes
  • Red-eye reduction

Operating system/software

Bundled software
  • Picture Package, PIXELA ImageMixer, USB Driver

Viewfinder

Camera viewfinder
  • LCD 3.0

Camera

Playback zoom
  • 5x
Camera file format
  • JPEG, MPEG1
Camera movie function
  • MPEG1

Light metering

Metering
  • Multi Pattern, Centre weighted, Spot
